title: Add permissions, admin workflows and eval coverage
objective: Harden the feature with explicit capabilities, review UI/admin and security evaluation.
requirements: Add capabilities for personal read/write/edit/delete, organization write/propose/review and secret handle operations.
Add admin visibility for write requests, candidates and secret handles without values.
Add eval cases for chat memory, candidate promotion and secret leakage.
acceptance_checks: Unauthorized user cannot read another user's personal memory.
Personal owner can edit/delete own memory.
Knowledge owner can accept/reject organization candidate.
